---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `digitakt`
2. Type `...`
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or tracebacks.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. macOS 14.x, Ubuntu 22.04)
- Python version: (e.g. 3.11.9)
- Digitakt firmware: (e.g. 1.51)
- MIDI connection: (USB direct / USB hub)
